bert_crf.definition: START/O -> I-X, or B/I-X -> I-Y when X != Y

START_TO_I.description: Sequence starts with I-X: START -> I-X.

O_TO_I.description: Outside tag followed by I-X: O -> I-X.

TYPE_TO_WRONG_I.description: Entity type switches into I-Y without B-Y: B/I-X -> I-Y where X != Y.

llm_fewshot.definition: START/O -> I-X, or B/I-X -> I-Y when X != Y

START_TO_I.description: Sequence starts with I-X: START -> I-X.

O_TO_I.description: Outside tag followed by I-X: O -> I-X.

TYPE_TO_WRONG_I.description: Entity type switches into I-Y without B-Y: B/I-X -> I-Y where X != Y.
